7 #include "FunctionManager.h"
8 #include <arcane/ISubDomain.h>
9 #include <ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/FunctionGraphPrinter.h>
10 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 6 12:32:59 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12 */
13 
14 extern "C" Arcane::ISubDomain* _arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain();
15 
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
17 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
18 
19 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
20 
21 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 
24 FunctionManager::
25 FunctionManager(bool fatal_if_unregistered, bool verbose, DerivativesMode dependencies_mode)
26 : m_fatal_if_unregistered(fatal_if_unregistered)
27 , m_verbose(verbose)
28 , m_dependencies_mode(dependencies_mode)
29 , m_trace(_arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain()->traceMng())
30 , m_functions(fatal_if_unregistered, m_trace)
31 , m_parameters(fatal_if_unregistered, m_trace){}
32 
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 
35 FunctionManager&
36 FunctionManager::
37 operator<<(FunctionPtr f)
38 {
39  if(f->isParameter())
40  m_parameters.add(f);
41  else
42  m_functions.add(f);
43  // modification du graphe les dependances doivent etre recalculees
44  m_dependencies.clear();
45  return *this;
46 }
47 
48 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
49 
50 void
51 FunctionManager::
52 registerOrReplace(FunctionPtr f)
53 {
54  const Integer id = f->id();
55  if(m_functions.find(id) != m_functions.end())
56  m_functions.replace(f);
57  else if(m_parameters.find(id) != m_parameters.end())
58  m_parameters.replace(f);
59  else{
60  *this<<f;
61  recomputeDependencies();
62  }
63 }
64 
65 
66 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
67 
68 const IFunction&
69 FunctionManager::
70 operator[](Integer i) const
71 {
72  const auto it_func = m_functions.find(i);
73  if(it_func != m_functions.end())
74  return *it_func;
75  const auto it_param = m_parameters.find(i);
76  if(it_param != m_parameters.end())
77  return *it_param;
78  throw Arcane::String::format("Function with id='{0}' is not registered", i);
79 }
80 
81 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
82 
83 bool
84 FunctionManager::
85 contains(const Property& p) const
86 {
87  const auto it_func = m_functions.find(p);
88  const auto it_param = m_parameters.find(p);
89  return ((it_func != m_functions.end()) || (it_param != m_parameters.end())) ;
90 }
91 
92 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
93 
94 const IFunction&
95 FunctionManager::
96 operator[](const Property& p) const
97 {
98  const auto it_func = m_functions.find(p);
99  if(it_func != m_functions.end())
100  return *it_func;
101  const auto it_param = m_parameters.find(p);
102  if(it_param != m_parameters.end())
103  return *it_param;
104  throw Arcane::String::format("Function to compute property '{0}' is not registered", p.name());
105 }
106 
107 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
108 
109 FunctionManager::Enumerator
110 FunctionManager::
111 functions(IntegerConstArrayView idx_output, DerivativesMode dependencies_mode) const
112 {
113  _recomputeDependenciesIfRequired();
114  // supprimer cette rustine liee a construction enumerateur
115  // quand possilite de gerer la profondeur du graphe
116  const bool recursive = (m_dependencies_mode==eComposition && dependencies_mode==eComposition);
117  return m_functions.toSortVector(idx_output, recursive);
118 }
119 
120 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
121 
122 FunctionManager::Enumerator
123 FunctionManager::
124 functions() const
125 {
126  _recomputeDependenciesIfRequired();
127  return m_functions_sort;
128 }
129 
130 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
131 
132 FunctionManager::Enumerator
133 FunctionManager::
134 parameters() const {
135  _recomputeDependenciesIfRequired();
136  return m_parameters_sort;
137 }
138 
139 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
140 
141 const std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector>
142 FunctionManager::
143 dependenciesGraph(const IFunction& f) const {
144  std::map<Law::Property, Law::PropertyVector> composed_prop_dependencies;
145  PropertyVector in_prop = f.in();
146  PropertyVector graph_dependencies = dependencies(f);
147  for(int i_prop = 0; i_prop < in_prop.size(); ++i_prop){
148  auto current_prop = in_prop[i_prop];
149  if(!graph_dependencies.contains(current_prop))
150  composed_prop_dependencies.insert(std::make_pair(current_prop, m_dependencies[current_prop]));
151  }
152  return composed_prop_dependencies;
153 }
154 
155 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
156 
157 void
158 FunctionManager::
159 recomputeDependencies() const
160 {
161  m_dependencies.clear();
162  m_dependencies = m_functions.computeDependencies(m_dependencies_mode);
163  auto dependencies_param = m_parameters.computeDependencies();
164  m_dependencies.insert(dependencies_param.begin(),dependencies_param.end());
165  m_functions_sort = m_functions.toSortVector();
166  m_parameters_sort = m_parameters.toSortVector();
167 }
168 
169 void
170 FunctionManager::
171 _recomputeDependenciesIfRequired() const
172 {
173  if(m_dependencies.empty())
174  recomputeDependencies();
175 }
176 
177 void
178 FunctionManager::
179 printDotGraph(std::ostream& nout, const bool verbose) const
180 {
181  if(verbose){
182  const FunctionVector functions = m_functions.toSortVector();
183  FunctionGraphPrinter::printDotGraph(functions, nout);
184  }
185  else{
186  m_functions.printDotGraph(nout);
187  }
188 }
189 
190 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
191 
192 std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const FunctionManager& f)
193 {
194  nout << "Function manager info :";
195  if(f.size() == 0) {
196  nout << " {empty}";
197  return nout;
198  }
199  for(auto e = f.functions(); e.hasNext(); ++e)
200  nout << "\n" << e.function();
201 
202  for(auto p = f.parameters(); p.hasNext(); ++p)
203  nout << "\n" << p.function();
204  return nout;
205 }
206 
207 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
208 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
209 
210 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
211
